who: medical clinic intake coordinators processing 10–20 patient eligibility verifications/month
offer: For medical clinic intake coordinators processing 10–20 invoices/month, time-consuming manual verification causes delays in patient intake. We streamline eligibility reporting instead of manual verification processes using spreadsheets and phone calls.
problem: Time-consuming manual verification of patient insurance eligibility
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical intake coordinators
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to medical intake coordinators with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among intake coordinators
try_it: Let users manually enter patient info and generate reports for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
